testcase.name: test_user_ledger_nonexistent_user

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent user, got: 520 assert 520 == 404 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_financial_management.py:118: in test_user_ledger_nonexistent_user assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404 for non-existent user, got: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent user, got: 520 E assert 520 == 404 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_redeem_settings_validation

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing required field, got: 520 assert 520 == 400 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_financial_management.py:206: in test_update_redeem_settings_validation assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for missing required field, got: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing required field, got: 520 E assert 520 == 400 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
